expectations.text: behavioral_check: Enumerates the *selection* tables (RippleLFPSelection in particular) alongside the parameter and output tables, not just the output tables
expectations.evidence: Lists RippleLFPSelection + part, LFPSelection, LFPBandSelection + part, plus RippleParameters in the explicit checklist.

expectations.text: behavioral_check: Identifies `PositionOutput` (via the `pos_merge_id` projection FK) as the hidden / easy-to-miss prerequisite — ripple detection uses position-derived speed
expectations.evidence: Section 2 names PositionOutput and pos_merge_id, explains 'ripple detection takes head speed as an input so it can mask out movement periods', and flags it as a non-obvious prerequisite.
